# Sample Roadmap

This is a sample roadmap file for testing roadmap parsing functionality.

## Overview

This roadmap demonstrates the expected format for project roadmaps.

## Phases

### Phase 1: Foundation

- Set up project structure
- Configure TypeScript
- Add testing framework

### Phase 2: Core Features

- Implement main functionality
- Add error handling
- Write documentation

### Phase 3: Polish

- Performance optimization
- Code review
- Release preparation

## Timeline

- Phase 1: Week 1-2
- Phase 2: Week 3-6
- Phase 3: Week 7-8
